document.source_title: Rishabh Pant IPL 2026: The grip problem that is unravelling his white-ball game

claims.claim_text: Rishabh Pant's grip technique is affecting his performance in white-ball cricket.
claims.evidence_text: Pant’s grip is over-rotated clockwise, past the back of the bat where it should be, leaving the bat face open on almost every ball.

metrics.name: Strike Rate
metrics.evidence_text: Batting at three slots — No. 2, 3 and 4 — across 11 innings, Pant’s strike rate languishes at 138.67.

metrics.name: Control Percentage
metrics.evidence_text: According to Cricket-21 data, Pant’s overall control stood at 66.7 per cent with a 128.3 strike rate after 50 games this season.

citations.title: Rishabh Pant IPL 2026: The grip problem that is unravelling his white-ball game

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet covering sports.
